market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Family Home near NEC and BHX
analysis.rewritten_desc: Immerse yourself in the comfort of this 6-bedroom home, perfect for families and groups. Located near the NEC and Birmingham International Airport (BHX), you'll find it easily accessible from anywhere. With a vast open-plan living space, you can socialize and make memories with your loved ones. Each bedroom has its own unique charm, providing ample space for a comfortable stay. Our home can accommodate up to 4 guests, and you can make this experience unforgettable with a personalized touch. Enjoy a relaxing atmosphere and unwind in our well-designed home with amenities that cater to your lifestyle.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space or garden (high-priority for families and groups)
Free parking for guests (a must-have for travelers)
Entertainment options like a TV or game console (adds to the overall experience)
analysis.photo_order_rec: The cover photo should feature the spacious living area, showcasing the open-plan layout and modern design, which will give potential guests an idea of the home's interior and make them feel at ease.
key_diagnosis: Increase revenue by £6,564 (£166/night x 36 open nights) by optimising the title, description, and amenities to attract more bookings.
Fill the vacant photo slots with high-quality images of the 6 bedrooms and other interior spaces, including the master bedroom which is missing from the current photo count.
The hosting experience can be improved by having an active host presence, with a goal of reaching 28% occupancy (the median for the market), currently at 59.8%
analysis.outreach_hook: Hi Patrick, we noticed you have 36 open nights, which translates to a potential revenue loss of £6,564. We'd like to help you optimise your listing and increase bookings.
